executives.name: Frank Jimenez
executives.background: Frank R. Jimenez is Group Vice President and General Counsel of GE HealthCare and previously served as General Counsel of the Navy.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Gretchen McClain
executives.background: Ms. McClain is an Operating Executive at The Carlyle Group and former CEO of Xylem Inc. She has extensive experience in technology and engineering.

executives.name: Surya Mohapatra
executives.background: Dr. Surya N. Mohapatra was formerly the Chairman, President and CEO of Quest Diagnostics Incorporated.

executives.name: Tom Pettit
executives.background: Mr. Pettit has served as Chief Operations Officer since 2020. Prior to joining Generac, he held senior leadership roles at several global manufacturing companies.

executives.name: Victoria Harker
executives.background: Victoria D. Harker served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of TEGNA Inc. and previously as CFO of AES Corporation.
